ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reference_types" (
  "reference_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference type */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label or name of the reference type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label or name of the reference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference */,
  "reference_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the reference_types table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplemental_references" (
  "supplemental_reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplemental reference */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label or name of the supplemental reference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the supplemental reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplemental_reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rail_gauges" (
  "gauge_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gauge code */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label or name of the gauge type */,
  "symbolic_constant" TEXT /* Symbolic constant for the gauge type */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the gauge type */,
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the references table */,
  "reference_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the reference_types table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gauge_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "rail_gauge_supplemental_references" (
  "gauge_code" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the rail_gauges table */,
  "supplemental_reference_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the supplemental_references table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gauge_code", "supplemental_reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail record */,
  "gauge_code" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the rail_gauges table */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the action was taken */,
  "user" TEXT /* User who took the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id")
)
